criteria.budgetStrategy: Driving trip, off-site or value lodging, limited park days, and careful ticket selection. Disney resort packages are unlikely under this budget for six people unless there is an unusually strong promotion.
preferredResortTypes: Value resort if major promotion appears
mustHave: Works for a three-year-old, six-year-old, teenagers, and two adults
Total estimate close to 2000 to 3000 dollars
niceToHave: One character meal option if the budget survives

agent.summary:
```json
{
  "summary": "The Bell Family can realistically plan a Walt Disney World trip within their target budget of $2,000 to $3,000 by driving from Texarkana/Genoa area, staying off-site at value or Good Neighbor hotels, and limiting park tickets to 1-2 days. The best fit deal currently is driving plus off-site hotel with one Disney park day estimated at $2,850, offering a balanced mix of cost, family suitability, and travel convenience. Higher experience options with more park days or Disney value resorts exceed the budget at this time. Several official Disney and ticket sources have been recently checked but show no current promotions that reduce costs. Careful monitoring for hotel price drops and ticket discounts is advised.",
  "bestMove": {

    "Prioritize booking the drive + off-site hotel + 1 park day deal when total cost is confirmed below $3,000.",
    "Monitor hotel prices and Disney ticket promotions closely during your target months for opportunities to improve the package or add a park day.",
    "Consider stretch options like a Good Neighbor hotel with two park days only if discounts bring the cost near or below $3,000.",
    "Avoid committing to Disney value resort promotions until a strong discount or package deal appears that fits your budget.",
```
